_value.title: MRVL Stock Rallies As AI Data Center Orders Explode - StocksToTrade
_value.description: MRVL’s new Teralynx T100 switch, at 102.4 Tbps, goes straight at the next AI bottleneck: moving massive data sets between GPUs and racks without frying power budgets. Sampling starts this quarter, which sets up a medium-term catalyst path as design wins accumulate.
